mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PLAYLISTS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PLAYLISTS ( PLAYLIST_ID, USER_ID, TITLE, DESCRIPTION, COVER_IMAGE_URL, PUBLIC_YN, ORIGIN_PLAYLIST_ID, ORIGIN_USER_NICKNAME ) VALUES ( #{playlistId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{description, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{coverImageUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{publicYn}, #{originPlaylistId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{originUserNickname, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT P.PLAYLIST_ID, P.USER_ID, U.NICKNAME AS USER_NICKNAME, P.TITLE, P.DESCRIPTION, P.COVER_IMAGE_URL, P.PUBLIC_YN, P.ORIGIN_PLAYLIST_ID, P.ORIGIN_USER_NICKNAME, P.VIEW_COUNT, P.LIKE_COUNT, P.COMMENT_COUNT, P.COPY_COUNT, P.CREATED_AT, P.UPDATED_AT, P.DELETED_AT FROM PLAYLISTS P JOIN USERS U ON U.USER_ID = P.USER_ID WHERE P.PLAYLIST_ID = #{playlistId} AND P.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND U.DELETED_AT IS NULL
SELECT P.PLAYLIST_ID, P.USER_ID, P.PUBLIC_YN FROM PLAYLISTS P JOIN USERS U ON U.USER_ID = P.USER_ID WHERE P.PLAYLIST_ID = #{playlistId} AND P.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND U.DELETED_AT IS NULL

SELECT P.PLAYLIST_ID, P.USER_ID, U.NICKNAME AS USER_NICKNAME, P.TITLE, P.DESCRIPTION, P.COVER_IMAGE_URL, P.PUBLIC_YN, P.ORIGIN_PLAYLIST_ID, P.ORIGIN_USER_NICKNAME, P.VIEW_COUNT, P.LIKE_COUNT, P.COMMENT_COUNT, P.COPY_COUNT, P.CREATED_AT, P.UPDATED_AT, P.DELETED_AT FROM PLAYLISTS P JOIN USERS U ON U.USER_ID = P.USER_ID WHERE P.PLAYLIST_ID = #{playlistId} AND P.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND U.DELETED_AT IS NULL FOR UPDATE

SELECT P.PLAYLIST_ID, P.USER_ID, U.NICKNAME AS USER_NICKNAME, P.TITLE, P.DESCRIPTION, P.COVER_IMAGE_URL, P.PUBLIC_YN, P.ORIGIN_PLAYLIST_ID, P.ORIGIN_USER_NICKNAME, P.VIEW_COUNT, P.LIKE_COUNT, P.COMMENT_COUNT, P.COPY_COUNT, P.CREATED_AT, P.UPDATED_AT, P.DELETED_AT FROM PLAYLISTS P JOIN USERS U ON U.USER_ID = P.USER_ID WHERE P.USER_ID = #{userId} AND P.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND U.DELETED_AT IS NULL ORDER BY P.CREATED_AT DESC, P.PLAYLIST_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT P.PLAYLIST_ID, P.USER_ID, U.NICKNAME AS USER_NICKNAME, P.TITLE, P.DESCRIPTION, P.COVER_IMAGE_URL, P.PUBLIC_YN, P.ORIGIN_PLAYLIST_ID, P.ORIGIN_USER_NICKNAME, P.VIEW_COUNT, P.LIKE_COUNT, P.COMMENT_COUNT, P.COPY_COUNT, P.CREATED_AT, P.UPDATED_AT, P.DELETED_AT FROM PLAYLISTS P JOIN USERS U ON U.USER_ID = P.USER_ID WHERE P.PUBLIC_YN = 'Y' AND P.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND U.DELETED_AT IS NULL
AND U.NICKNAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND P.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY P.VIEW_COUNT DESC, P.CREATED_AT DESC, P.PLAYLIST_ID DESC
ORDER BY P.LIKE_COUNT DESC, P.CREATED_AT DESC, P.PLAYLIST_ID DESC
ORDER BY P.COMMENT_COUNT DESC, P.CREATED_AT DESC, P.PLAYLIST_ID DESC
ORDER BY P.CREATED_AT DESC, P.PLAYLIST_ID DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT P.PLAYLIST_ID, P.USER_ID, U.NICKNAME AS USER_NICKNAME, P.TITLE, P.DESCRIPTION, P.COVER_IMAGE_URL, P.PUBLIC_YN, P.ORIGIN_PLAYLIST_ID, P.ORIGIN_USER_NICKNAME, P.VIEW_COUNT, P.LIKE_COUNT, P.COMMENT_COUNT, P.COPY_COUNT, P.CREATED_AT, P.UPDATED_AT, P.DELETED_AT FROM PLAYLIST_LIKES PL JOIN PLAYLISTS P ON P.PLAYLIST_ID = PL.PLAYLIST_ID JOIN USERS U ON U.USER_ID = P.USER_ID WHERE PL.USER_ID = #{userId} AND PL.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND P.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND U.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND (P.PUBLIC_YN = 'Y' OR P.USER_ID = #{userId}) ORDER BY PL.CREATED_AT DESC, PL.LIKE_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE PLAYLISTS SET TITLE = #{title}, DESCRIPTION = #{description, jdbcType=CLOB}, COVER_IMAGE_URL = #{coverImageUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PUBLIC_YN = #{publicYn}, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE PLAYLIST_ID = #{playlistId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
UPDATE PLAYLISTS SET DELETED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE PLAYLIST_ID = #{playlistId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
UPDATE PLAYLIST_TRACKS SET DELETED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE PLAYLIST_ID = #{playlistId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
UPDATE COMMENTS SET DELETED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE PLAYLIST_ID = #{playlistId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
UPDATE PLAYLIST_LIKES SET DELETED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE PLAYLIST_ID = #{playlistId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
UPDATE PLAYLISTS SET COMMENT_COUNT = COMMENT_COUNT + 1, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE PLAYLIST_ID = #{playlistId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
UPDATE PLAYLISTS SET COMMENT_COUNT = GREATEST(COMMENT_COUNT - 1, 0), UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE PLAYLIST_ID = #{playlistId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
UPDATE PLAYLISTS SET LIKE_COUNT = LIKE_COUNT + 1 WHERE PLAYLIST_ID = #{playlistId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
UPDATE PLAYLISTS SET LIKE_COUNT = GREATEST(LIKE_COUNT - 1, 0) WHERE PLAYLIST_ID = #{playlistId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
UPDATE PLAYLISTS SET COPY_COUNT = COPY_COUNT + 1 WHERE PLAYLIST_ID = #{playlistId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
UPDATE PLAYLISTS SET VIEW_COUNT = VIEW_COUNT + 1 WHERE PLAYLIST_ID = #{playlistId} AND PUBLIC_YN = 'Y' AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT LIKE_COUNT FROM PLAYLISTS WHERE PLAYLIST_ID = #{playlistId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
